name: Waifu Cards
short_description: Welcome to the fairytale castle of sweets, where charming waifu and exciting card game Go Fish are waiting for you!
detailed_description:
Welcome to the fairytale castle of sweets, where charming waifu and exciting card game Go Fish are waiting for you!

Forget about boring gray everyday life! In Waifu Cards you are waiting for an adventure in a magical world full of sweets, bright colors and, of course, beautiful anime girls! Test your luck and intuition by trying to guess which cards your charming rivals are holding.

Dive into the atmosphere of carefree fun and enjoy the sweet company of the most charming waifu in Candy Castle!

Your task is simple: ask the girls if they have a particular card. If you guess, you get points! If not, “Go Fish!” and pull a card from the deck. Collect as many pairs of cards as possible and become the ultimate champion of Waifu Cards!

Key Features:

*Relaxing gameplay: Enjoy leisurely and addictive gameplay, perfect for rest and relaxation; *Charming Waifu: Meet several sexy anime girls residing in Candy Castle and try to outsmart them in a card game;
*Gambling: Test your intuition and luck by guessing the cards in your opponents' hands. Each win will bring you not only points, but also a lot of fun;

Waifu Cards is the perfect way to relax and enjoy your favorite card game in the company of beautiful waifu in the magical world of sweets.
